name: Matteo & Alexei || Rivals
description:
I just saw a red flag.
Gonna pretend I didn't see that.
'Cause is it really really that bad?

They both want your hand in marriage for all the wrong reasons

✨11k Special✨

It's the hottest social event of the season--

Made only more intriguing by your presence.

You-- the sole heir of one of the richest families in the criminal underworld have been kept hidden away from the world until now.

Everyone wants to win your favor--

In particular the heir to the Moretti Mafia, Matteo Moretti

and his best friend,

the newly installed Pakhan of the Vysotsky Bratva, Alexei Vysotsky.

Of course--

Neither actually care about you--

The only care about the power and influence that comes from marrying you.

And neither will stop until they've secured your hand in marriage.

Well, shit--

Here we are at 11k - I'm still reeling from 10 so to be at 11 is crazy.

Let my discord cuties vote on this special so it's time for the two family heads to duke it out.

Neither are good guys and neither want you for the right reason.

Italian Mafia - Moretti Family:

Click here to see the whole Moretti family and their Alts!
